title: Rename 'Latest News' to 'Today News' and reorder Roster above News section

requirements.text: In the Latest News section (NewsSection.tsx), change the section heading text from 'Latest News' (or its current label) to 'Today News'.

quotes: letest news wale text par likho: Today News

acceptanceCriteria: The News section heading displays 'Today News' instead of 'Latest News' or any previous label.
No other text or layout in the News section is affected.

requirements.text: In LandingPage.tsx, reorder the sections so that the RosterSection (Meet With LEGEND) is rendered above the NewsSection (Today News). Currently the order is Hero → About → Roster → News → Footer; keep this order but ensure Roster comes before News.

quotes: Meet Wale Ko Uper Kro Or News wale ko neeche ko kro aap

acceptanceCriteria: On the landing page, the 'Meet With LEGEND' roster section appears visually above the 'Today News' section.
All other sections (Hero, About, Footer) remain in their current positions.
No content or styling is removed from either section.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/.
Do not change the 'Meet With LEGEND' heading text already applied to RosterSection — preserve it.
Do not alter the 'Join Now / For Tournament' CTA button text already applied in the News section.
nonGoals: Changing any backend logic or data models.
Modifying the Hero or About sections.
Changing any styling, colors, or animations beyond what is explicitly requested.
